name: HydraLiquid – Hydrating Solution
shortDescription: Farmona Professional regenerating, soothing, and hydrating solution, 500 ml. With chanterelle, strawberry, blackberry, and raspberry extracts, betaine, allantoin. Approx. 50 treatments.
description:
The Farmona Professional Hydra Technology Regenerating Solution is a high active ingredient professional solution enriched with natural extracts, specifically designed for modern cleansing and skin renewal procedures.

It contains chanterelle, strawberry, blackberry, and raspberry extracts, as well as betaine and allantoin, whose synergistic combination intensively supports skin regeneration, hydration, and soothing.

500 ml size, sufficient for approximately 50 treatments. For professional use only.

faq.question: How many treatments does a 500 ml bottle last?
faq.answer: A 500 ml bottle is sufficient for approximately 50 treatments, which means extremely economical usage.

faq.question: Which devices can this solution be used with?
faq.answer: The solution is a professional regenerating liquid designed for cavitation peeling and hydro-abrasion treatments (also in combination with hydrogen cleansing). Excellent as a base solution for soothing, skin renewal, and revitalizing protocols.

faq.question: What skin type is the hydrating solution recommended for?
faq.answer: Ideal for dull, irritated, sensitive, and dehydrated skin. It deeply hydrates, soothes, smooths the skin surface, and revitalizes tired skin. Its natural extracts have nourishing and antioxidant effects.

whatsIncluded: 1 pc Farmona Professional HydraLiquid hydrating solution (500 ml)
